name: vendor.myndhyve.ads-export
description: MyndHyve ads.export.pack — pure-logic export pack builder. Bundles copy variants + creative assets + tracking links into a structured AdExportPack record (JSON-serializable). Lifted from src/canvas-types/campaign-studio/ads-studio/export/AdExportPackService.ts. No host capabilities required; deterministic.
author: MyndHyve

nodes.label: Create Ads Export Pack
nodes.description: Bundle copy variants + creative assets + tracking links into an AdExportPack record. Validates item count + total asset size against configurable maxima. Returns the pack record (JSON-serializable); host stores it or pipes to a downstream `core.openwop.http.fetch` for upload. Optional `config.emitCsv` / `config.emitJson` produce string representations of the pack alongside the record.
